## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes in any workspace I touched
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] I added a test for the new behaviour (or explained why one isn't needed)
- [ ] I updated the README / CHANGELOG if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` files committed
